seo.title: Mike's Tires | Tire Shop in Dallas, TX | Used & New Tires
seo.description: Mike's Tires offers new and used tires, tire repair, and wheel alignment in Dallas, TX. Call (214) 327-4019 for expert service and unbeatable prices.

hero.headline: New & Used Tires at Unbeatable Prices
hero.subheadline: Professional tire installation, repair, and alignment services you can trust.

featureSections.title: Wide Selection of New & Used Tires
featureSections.body: We stock top brands like Michelin, Bridgestone, Goodyear, and more. Whether you need budget-friendly used tires or premium new ones, we have the right fit for your vehicle and budget.
bullets: High-quality used tires with tread depth guarantee
Free mounting and balancing with purchase
featureSections.cardBody: We carry Michelin, Bridgestone, Goodyear, Pirelli, and more. Find the perfect tire for your car.

featureSections.title: Professional Tire Services
featureSections.body: From tire repair to wheel alignment, our certified technicians ensure your vehicle runs safely and smoothly. We use state-of-the-art equipment and offer fast turnaround times.
featureSections.cardTitle: Get Back on the Road Quickly
featureSections.cardBody: Most services completed within an hour. Schedule an appointment for priority service.

whyChooseUs.title: Experienced Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team has over 15 years of combined experience in tire sales and service.

whyChooseUs.title: Competitive Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: We offer the best prices in Dallas on both new and used tires.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer Satisfaction Guaranteed
whyChooseUs.description: We stand behind our work with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

whyChooseUs.title: Convenient Location
whyChooseUs.description: Located in the heart of Dallas with easy access and ample parking.

testimonials.quote: Mike's Tires saved me money on a set of used tires that look and perform like new. Fast service and friendly staff!
testimonials.author: John D.

testimonials.quote: I've been coming here for years. They always have the tires I need and the prices are unbeatable.
testimonials.author: Maria S.

testimonials.quote: Professional and honest. They fixed a slow leak quickly and didn't try to upsell me. Highly recommend.
testimonials.author: David R.

cta.headline: Ready for New Tires?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free quote and expert advice.

servicesPage.intro: At Mike's Tires, we offer a full range of tire services to keep you safe on the road. From new and used tire sales to repairs and alignment, our team has you covered.

services.title: New Tire Sales
services.shortDescription: Top brand new tires with warranty and professional installation.
services.longDescription: We offer a wide selection of new tires from leading manufacturers. Our experts help you choose the best tire for your driving needs and budget. Every new tire comes with a manufacturer warranty and free mounting and balancing.
benefits: Latest tire technology for better grip and fuel efficiency
Expert advice on the right tire for your vehicle

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We assess your vehicle and driving habits to recommend the best tire options.

process.title: Selection
process.description: Choose from our inventory of top brands. We'll show you the best options in your price range.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our technicians mount, balance, and install your new tires quickly and safely.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for new tires?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options through our partners. Ask us for details.

faqs.question: How long does it take to install new tires?
faqs.answer: Most installations are completed within an hour, depending on vehicle type.

services.title: Used Tires
services.shortDescription: Affordable, quality-checked used tires with tread depth guarantee.
services.longDescription: Save money without sacrificing safety. Our used tires are thoroughly inspected for tread depth, sidewall condition, and overall integrity. We offer a tread depth guarantee on all used tires.
benefits: Significant savings compared to new tires
All major brands and sizes available

process.title: Inspection
process.description: Each used tire is carefully inspected for quality and safety.

process.title: Selection
process.description: Browse our inventory of matching used tires for your vehicle.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We mount and balance your used tires, ensuring proper fit and performance.

faqs.question: How long do used tires last?
faqs.answer: Our used tires typically have 50-80% tread life remaining, giving you thousands of miles of safe driving.

faqs.question: Do you warranty used tires?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day warranty on all used tires against defects.

services.title: Tire Repair & Patching
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable tire repair for punctures and leaks.
services.longDescription: Don't let a flat tire ruin your day. Our technicians can repair most punctures and leaks quickly. We use industry-standard patch and plug methods to ensure a lasting repair.
benefits: Cost-effective alternative to buying a new tire
Free tire pressure check with every repair

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We locate the puncture and assess if it's repairable based on size and location.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We patch and plug the tire from the inside for a secure, long-lasting fix.

process.title: Reinstall & Balance
process.description: The tire is remounted, balanced, and reinstalled on your vehicle.

faqs.question: Can all punctures be repaired?
faqs.answer: Punctures in the tread area up to 1/4 inch can usually be repaired. Sidewall damage is not repairable.

faqs.question: How much does a tire repair cost?
faqs.answer: We offer flat-rate tire repair starting at $20. Call us for an exact quote.

services.title: Wheel Alignment & Balancing
services.shortDescription: Precision alignment and balancing for a smoother ride.
services.longDescription: Proper wheel alignment and balancing extend tire life and improve handling. Our state-of-the-art alignment system ensures your vehicle meets manufacturer specifications. We also offer computerized wheel balancing for a vibration-free ride.
benefits: Extended tire life and even tread wear

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check tire pressure, tread wear, and suspension components.

process.title: Alignment
process.description: Using laser alignment tools, we adjust camber, caster, and toe angles to spec.

process.title: Balancing
process.description: Each wheel is balanced to eliminate vibrations and ensure a smooth ride.

faqs.question: How often should I get an alignment?
faqs.answer: We recommend an alignment every 6,000 miles or when you notice uneven tire wear or pulling.

faqs.question: Will alignment fix a crooked steering wheel?
faqs.answer: Yes, alignment often corrects a crooked steering wheel. We'll adjust it to center.

about.headline: About Mike's Tires
about.mission: To provide Dallas drivers with high-quality tires and expert service at fair prices, ensuring safety and satisfaction on every visit.
story: Mike's Tires was founded in 2008 with a simple mission: offer reliable tires and honest service to the Dallas community. What started as a small shop has grown into a trusted destination for drivers across the city, thanks to our commitment to quality and customer care.

Over the years, we've served thousands of customers, built lasting relationships, and earned a reputation for integrity. Our team stays up-to-date with the latest tire technology and service techniques to provide the best possible experience. We're proud to be a locally owned and operated business that puts customers first.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We believe in honest recommendations and transparent pricing.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We only offer products and services that meet our high standards.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local Dallas initiatives and treat every customer like a neighbor.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We stand behind our work and ensure you leave satisfied.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to upgrade your tires? Call or visit us today.
